title: Apricot Citrus Crème Brûlée
description: A rich and creamy dessert featuring the sweetness of apricot and citrus, topped with a caramelized sugar crust.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together egg yolks, sugar, and salt. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and reaches 160°F (71°C).
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in heavy cream, apricot jam, orange zest, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
Strain the mixture into 4-6 ramekins or small baking dishes.
Place the ramekins in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until set.
Remove the ramekins from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Just before serving, sprinkle a thin layer of granulated sugar over the top of each ramekin.
Caramelize the sugar with a kitchen torch or under the broiler.
